meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Project Management to Solve Unfinished Apps
content.seo_description: Stop starting and start finishing. Master project management for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-impact portfolio apps.
content.answer_block: The secret to finishing projects isn't more code; it's constrained scope management. By breaking your vision into atomic, 2-hour implementation blocks using AI-assisted project management, you eliminate decision fatigue. Use Antigravity to map your architecture and Claude Code to execute, ensuring every session results in a deployable feature.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: a folder full of 'v1' repositories that never saw the light of day. The initial rush of a new idea fades, replaced by the crushing weight of architectural debt and scope creep. It is the silent killer of student portfolios, turning potential breakthroughs into abandoned experiments.

But the gap between a student and a senior developer isn't just raw coding speed; it is the discipline of project management. By treating your code like a professional product, you turn infinite possibilities into a finished, ship-ready reality. It is time to stop dreaming and start shipping.

steps.title: Define the Atomic MVP
steps.description: Strip your project to the absolute bare minimum required for utility. Use Antigravity to define the core data models.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project idea and distill it into the absolute minimum viable feature set that delivers core value. Create a schema definition for the primary database entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate schema.prisma based on the Antigravity output'

steps.title: Establish the Task Sprint
steps.description: Break the project into 90-minute work blocks. Never leave a task in an ambiguous state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a roadmap of 5 distinct 90-minute tasks to build the MVP. For each task, define the acceptance criteria and the technical approach.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review this task list and generate a checklist for task 1'

steps.title: AI-Driven Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle boilerplate while you focus on the logic layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the service layer logic for the authentication flow, emphasizing security best practices for a student project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the auth service using the generated logic'

steps.title: Automated Testing Loop
steps.description: If you don't test it, it's not finished. Automate the verification of your MVP features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of unit tests for the core business logic generated in step 3 using Jest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run the generated test suite and fix any regressions'

steps.title: Deployment as a Milestone
steps.description: Deploy early to get a public URL. A project is only 'finished' when it is live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a configuration guide to deploy this MVP to Vercel with environment variables for production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure the deployment pipeline and push to production'

pro_tips: Never start coding without a written definition of 'Done' for the current session.
Use Claude Code to perform a 'self-code review' before every commit to catch technical debt early.
Treat your README as a living document; update it as you finish each Antigravity task.
If a task takes longer than 2 hours, split it into two smaller, more manageable sub-tasks.
Always maintain a 'parking lot' file for features that occur to you mid-build but are not part of the MVP.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, share the link in our community forum to get a peer code review. Use the feedback to iterate on a single 'v2' feature before starting your next project.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished code sit in your local directory. Adopt a professional workflow, master your project management, and build a portfolio that stands out to recruiters. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
